channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 955d0cb2-de4e-43ed-819a-14220e079ba7
Display name: Cosmos DB Long Term Retention Restore Role
Description: Allows performing long term retention restore operations for Cosmos DB
Link: https://management.azure.com/955d0cb2-de4e-43ed-819a-14220e079ba7?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: fc896ebc-f9a8-484d-a5ff-bd6a8c36289f
Display name: Cosmos DB Long Term Retention Backup Role
Description: Allows performing long term retention backup operations for Cosmos DB
Link: https://management.azure.com/fc896ebc-f9a8-484d-a5ff-bd6a8c36289f?api-version=2022-04-01
